allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tasks=d.get\('tasks',[]\); print\(f'Total: {len\(tasks\)}'\); statuses={}; [statuses.update\({t['status']: statuses.get\(t['status'],0\)+1}\) for t in tasks]; print\(statuses\); phases={}; [phases.update\({t.get\('phase','?'\): phases.get\(t.get\('phase','?'\),0\)+1}\) for t in tasks]; print\(phases\); pending=[t for t in tasks if t['status']=='pending']; print\('First 5 pending:'\); [print\(f\\"  {t['id']} [{t.get\('priority','?'\)}] {t['title'][:60]}\\"\) for t in pending[:5]]")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('tasks.json','utf8'\)\); const t=d.tasks||d; ['TASK-108','TASK-113'].forEach\(id=>{const x=t.find\(t=>t.id===id\); console.log\(x.id,x.description?.slice\(0,120\)\); console.log\('deps:', x.dependencies?.join\(', '\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('tasks.json','utf8'\)\); const t=d.tasks||d; ['TASK-022','TASK-027','TASK-101'].forEach\(id=>{const x=t.find\(t=>t.id===id\); if\(x\) console.log\(x.id, x.status, x.description?.slice\(0,60\)\)}\)")

PowerShell(cd C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki; $json = Get-Content tasks.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.tasks | Where-Object { $_.status -eq 'pending' -and $_.phase -eq 'mvp' } | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\) [$\($_.priority\)] $\($_.title\)" })

PowerShell(cd C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki; $json = Get-Content tasks.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.tasks | Where-Object { $_.status -eq 'pending' -and $_.phase -eq 'mvp' -and $_.priority -eq 'high' } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\): $\($_.title\)" })

PowerShell(cd C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki; $json = Get-Content tasks.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $ids = @\('TASK-017','TASK-018','TASK-100','TASK-107','TASK-111'\); $ids | ForEach-Object { $id = $_; $t = $json.tasks | Where-Object { $_.id -eq $id }; "$\($t.id\): $\($t.title\) | deps=$\($t.dependencies -join ','\)" })

PowerShell(cd C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki; $json = Get-Content tasks.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $ids = @\('TASK-008','TASK-082','TASK-081','TASK-014','TASK-033'\); $ids | ForEach-Object { $id = $_; $t = $json.tasks | Where-Object { $_.id -eq $id }; "$\($t.id\) [$\($t.status\)]: $\($t.description.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(60, $t.description.Length\)\)\)" })
Bash(awk 'NR%3==1{id=$0} NR%3==2{phase=$0} NR%3==0{status=$0; print id " | " phase " | " status}')
Bash(awk 'NR%3==1{id=$0} NR%3==2{desc=$0} NR%3==0{status=$0; if \(status ~ /pending/\) print id " => " desc}')

PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki\\tasks.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $content.tasks | Where-Object {$_.status -eq 'pending' -or $_.status -eq 'blocked'} | Select-Object id, title, phase, priority, @{n='dep';e={$_.dep}} | Sort-Object phase, priority | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki\\tasks.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $tasks = $content.tasks | Where-Object {$_.status -eq 'pending' -or $_.status -eq 'blocked'} | Sort-Object phase, priority; foreach \($t in $tasks\) { "{0}  {1}  [{2}]  {3}  deps: {4}" -f $t.id, $t.title, $t.phase, $t.priority, \($t.dep -join ','\) })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki\\tasks.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $tasks = $content.tasks | Where-Object {$_.status -eq 'pending' -or $_.status -eq 'blocked'} | Sort-Object phase, priority; foreach \($t in $tasks\) { $depStr = if \($t.dep -and $t.dep.Count -gt 0\) { $t.dep -join ',' } else { '-' }; "{0,-12} {1,-40} [{2,-12}] {3,-8} deps: {4}" -f $t.id, \($t.title | Select-String -Pattern '.{1,40}' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Matches | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value\)[0], $t.phase, $t.priority, $depStr })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki\\tasks.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $tasks = $content.tasks | Where-Object {$_.status -eq 'pending' -or $_.status -eq 'blocked'} | Sort-Object phase, priority; foreach \($t in $tasks\) { $deps = if \($null -eq $t.dep -or $t.dep.Count -eq 0\) { '-' } else { \($t.dep -join ','\) }; Write-Host \("{0,-12} {1,-30} {2,-12} {3,-8} deps:{4}" -f $t.id, $t.title, $t.phase, $t.priority, $deps\) })
PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki\\tasks.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $first = $content.tasks[0]; $first | Get-Member -MemberType Properties | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki\\tasks.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $first = $content.tasks | Where-Object {$_.status -eq 'pending' -or $_.status -eq 'blocked'} | Select-Object -First 1; $first | ConvertTo-Json)

PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki\\tasks.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $tasks = $content.tasks | Where-Object {$_.status -eq 'pending' -or $_.status -eq 'blocked'} | Sort-Object phase, priority; foreach \($t in $tasks\) { $deps = if \($null -eq $t.dependencies -or $t.dependencies.Count -eq 0\) { '-' } else { \($t.dependencies -join ','\) }; $desc = if \($t.description.Length -gt 30\) { $t.description.Substring\(0,30\) + '...' } else { $t.description }; Write-Host \("{0,-12} {1,-35} {2,-12} {3,-8} deps:{4}" -f $t.id, $desc, $t.phase, $t.priority, $deps\) })
PowerShell(cd C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki; \(Get-Content tasks.json | ConvertFrom-Json\) | Where-Object { $_.id -in @\('TASK-017','TASK-038'\) } | Select-Object id, status 2>&1)

PowerShell($raw = Get-Content "C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki\\tasks.json" -Raw; $tasks = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Total tasks: $\($tasks.Count\)"; $tasks[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 2 | Select-Object -First 10)

PowerShell($raw = Get-Content "C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki\\tasks.json" -Raw; $obj = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $obj.tasks | Where-Object { $_.status -eq "pending" -and $_.phase -eq "mvp" } | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\) [$\($_.priority\)] $\($_.description\)" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki"; $t = Get-Content tasks.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $t = $t.TrimStart\([char]0xFEFF\); $obj = $t | ConvertFrom-Json; $done = @\($obj.tasks | Where-Object {$_.status -eq 'done'} | ForEach-Object {$_.id}\); $pending = $obj.tasks | Where-Object {$_.status -eq 'pending' -and $_.phase -eq 'mvp'}; $ready = $pending | Where-Object { $deps = $_.dependencies; if \(-not $deps -or $deps.Count -eq 0\) { $true } else { \($deps | Where-Object {$_ -notin $done}\).Count -eq 0 } }; $ready | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.id\)|$\($_.priority\)|$\($_.title\)" }; "Total ready: $\($ready.Count\), Total pending: $\($pending.Count\)")

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki"; $t = Get-Content tasks.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $t = $t.TrimStart\([char]0xFEFF\); $obj = $t | ConvertFrom-Json; $task = $obj.tasks | Where-Object {$_.id -eq 'TASK-018'}; $task | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Soft\\Projects\\Poputchiki"; $t = Get-Content tasks.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $t = $t.TrimStart\([char]0xFEFF\); $obj = $t | ConvertFrom-Json; @\('TASK-039','TASK-040','TASK-041','TASK-042','TASK-043'\) | ForEach-Object { $id = $_; $task = $obj.tasks | Where-Object {$_.id -eq $id}; "$\($task.id\): $\($task.title\) | $\($task.description\)" })
